hero.headline:
Your Neighborhood Pool Team Since
Day One
hero.subheadline: For 16 years, Richardson families have trusted Brian and the Aqua Pool Care crew to keep their pools sparkling without the big-company price tag. Honest work, fair prices, and a real person who answers when you call.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">a Team That Knows Your Name
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full resurfacing, Aqua Pool Care handles it all so you can spend your weekends in the water instead of working on it. No corporate runaround, just reliable service from people who live in your neighborhood.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing walls and tile, emptying baskets, and chemical checks every single week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Water Chemistry & Balancing
cards.description: Expert testing and precise balancing of pH, chlorine, alkalinity, and calcium hardness. Safe, clear water that's gentle on skin and eyes every time.

cards.title: Algae Treatment & Removal
cards.description: Green, yellow, or black algae — we diagnose and eliminate it fast with professional-grade treatment. Your pool goes from swamp to sparkling in days.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Service
cards.description: Pumps, motors, filters, heaters, and automated systems diagnosed and repaired by experienced hands. Most issues fixed on the first visit.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing & Replastering
cards.description: Cracked, stained, or worn pool surfaces restored to like-new condition. Full interior resurfacing that protects your pool and looks beautiful.

cards.title: DE Filter & Heater Service
cards.description: Thorough DE filter cleaning for crystal-clear water, plus professional pool heater installation so you can swim comfortably year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call Brian Directly
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. Brian personally reviews every request and gets back to you within 24 hours with an honest, no-pressure estimate.

steps.title: We Show Up On Time
steps.description: Our CPO-certified crew arrives on schedule with everything needed. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — handled with care by people who treat your pool like their own.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Again
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, your equipment runs smoothly, and you have a team that actually picks up the phone when you call. That's the Aqua Pool Care difference.

about.label: Why Richardson Trusts Aqua Pool Care
about.headline: Family-Owned Means We Treat Every Pool Like Our Own
about.description: Since 2010, Brian McDonald has built Aqua Pool Care on old-school values: show up when you say you will, do honest work, and charge a fair price. As a family-owned business in Richardson, we know our clients by name, not account number. We're not the cheapest and we're not the flashiest — we're the team your neighbors keep recommending because we simply get the job done right, every single week.

features.title: Direct Owner Communication
features.description: When you call Aqua Pool Care, you talk to Brian — not a call center, not a receptionist. The owner handles your questions, concerns, and scheduling personally.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no fine print. Stay because you're happy, not because you're locked in.

features.title: Neighborhood-First Service
features.description: We live and work in the same DFW communities we serve. Your pool isn't a number to us — it's our neighbor's backyard, and we treat it that way.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every job quoted upfront with honest pricing. No contracts, no hidden fees — just dependable pool care from a family business that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Swim-Ready" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not satisfied with a service visit, call Brian directly and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We've spent 16 years building our reputation on honest work and follow-through in the Richardson community. Your satisfaction isn't a policy buried in fine print — it's a handshake promise from the owner himself.

faqs.question: How quickly can Aqua Pool Care start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies or urgent repairs, call Brian directly at +1 972-238-0008 and we'll prioritize getting a crew out as soon as possible.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during pool service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you're away. You'll know exactly what was done each visit, and Brian is always a phone call away if you have questions.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Aqua Pool Care holds a Texas pool service license, and our team includes CPO-certified operators. We carry full liability insurance so your property and your family are always protected.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel my service?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties. We don't do contracts because we believe in earning your business every single visit. No guilt trips, no hoops to jump through.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the DFW metroplex?
faqs.answer: We serve Richardson, Plano, Allen, McKinney, Frisco, Garland, Murphy, Wylie, Sachse, Melissa, and surrounding Dallas-Fort Worth communities. If you're nearby, give us a call — we probably service your area.

testimonials.name: Richard K.
testimonials.text: They have the right idea on what customer service is all about. Prompt, friendly, honest, quality, and professional work. I highly recommend Aqua Pool Care for all your pool needs.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: A great experience from start to finish. Quick to return calls, set up estimates, and provide a reasonable bid. Constant contact about project progress and followed up after the work was complete.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: Excellent pool company. They installed a new liner and it was completed in just a few hours. Very satisfied with the results and the entire process was smooth and professional.
